---
name: Content suggestion
about: Suggest a new module, update, or improvement to the curriculum
title: "[Content] "
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

## What topic or content is this about?

<!-- Which module, or what new topic are you suggesting? -->

## Why is it important for the team right now?

<!-- What problem does this solve? What will engineers be able to do after learning this? -->

## What changed? (if updating existing content)

<!-- If AI tooling/concepts changed, describe what's different and when the change happened -->

## Suggested resources or source material

<!-- Any links, papers, docs, or examples that would be useful -->

## Would you be willing to write a first draft?

- [ ] Yes, I can write a draft
- [ ] I can contribute notes/outline but need help writing
- [ ] Just flagging — someone else should write it
